flashcards.text: Around 50% of people have experienced at least one lucid dream in their lifetime.
Most vivid dreams occur during Rapid Eye Movement (REM) sleep, which happens about 90 minutes after you fall asleep.
In ancient Egypt, people believed that dreams were messages from the gods and sought advice from dream oracles.
You forget 90% of your dreams within the first 10 minutes of waking up.
The periodic table of elements, the sewing machine, and the structure of DNA were all inspired by dreams.
Blind people also dream. People who were born blind experience dreams involving their other senses like sound, smell, and touch.
The Roman Senate once decreed that striking or interpreting significant dreams must be reported to the state.
